GameDetail.emailStepDesc: We use your email to send payment proof and transaction status.

GameCheckout.toastVaMinAmount: Virtual account is only available for purchases above Rp 10,000.
GameCheckout.toastFillAccount: Fill in and validate your account details first.
GameCheckout.validationVaMinAmount: Virtual account is only available for purchases above Rp 10,000.
GameCheckout.contactEmailHint: We use your email to send voucher codes and transaction receipts.
GameCheckout.helpSubtitle: You can reach our admin here.
GameCheckout.maintenanceDescription: Top up for this game is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
GameCheckout.howToRedeemTitle: How to redeem a voucher for {name}
GameCheckout.voucherStep7: Check email or Transactions to see your voucher code
GameCheckout.voucherStep8: Redeem the voucher on the official website
GameCheckout.faq1q: Is it safe to top up on Pakargaming?
GameCheckout.faq1a: Yes, 100% safe. You do not need to log in to your game account. Just enter your User ID / Server ID and complete payment. Items are delivered automatically to your account while your data stays protected.
GameCheckout.faq2q: How long until the item reaches my account?
GameCheckout.faq2a: Very fast—usually within seconds after payment succeeds.
GameCheckout.faq3q: What payment methods are available on Pakargaming?
GameCheckout.faq4q: How do I find my ID?
GameCheckout.faq4Li2: Tap the profile icon on the home screen
GameCheckout.faq4Li3: Find your ID number under the character name
GameCheckout.faq4Li4: Copy it and use it when topping up on Pakargaming
GameCheckout.faq5q: Why hasn't my item arrived after I paid?
GameCheckout.faq5P1: If it has been more than 15 minutes, please check:
GameCheckout.faq5Li1: Whether your User ID is correct
GameCheckout.faq5Li2: Whether your payment status is successful
GameCheckout.faq5P2: If it still fails, contact Pakargaming CS via Chat Support / WhatsApp.
GameCheckout.faq6P1: Yes! Discounts and events—follow our official social media to stay updated.

CheckTransaction.heroBody: View your purchase details using your invoice number—no login required. Fast, secure, and real-time.
CheckTransaction.formatError: Format must be PAY- followed by digits

TransactionStatus.notePaid: Your order has been processed. You can start a new transaction anytime.
TransactionStatus.noteFailed: No worries, you can try again using the same or a different payment method.
TransactionStatus.notePending: Please complete payment before the deadline to avoid expiration.
TransactionStatus.checkOtp: Check OTP on your phone number
TransactionStatus.carrierStep1: Wait for an SMS from Smartfren on your registered phone number.
TransactionStatus.carrierStep2: Reply to that SMS with the OTP code to confirm the payment.
TransactionStatus.carrierStep3: An amount of {amount} will be deducted automatically from your Smartfren airtime balance.
TransactionStatus.carrierStep4: Wait a moment until the transaction status updates to successful.
TransactionStatus.carrierNote: Make sure your Smartfren airtime balance is sufficient to cover the payment.
TransactionStatus.scanQrHint: Scan this QR with your e-wallet or mobile banking app.
TransactionStatus.qrCodeHint: Copy this code, then use pay-with-QR / paste code in a supported e-wallet or mobile banking app.
TransactionStatus.ovoHint: Please open the OVO app to continue payment.
TransactionStatus.otcStep1: Write down and save your {outlet} payment code: {code}.
TransactionStatus.otcStep2: Go to the nearest {outlet} cashier and inform them that you want to make a "Faspay payment".
TransactionStatus.otcStep3: Provide your {outlet} payment code to the cashier and complete the payment of {amount}.
TransactionStatus.otcStep4: Keep your payment receipt as valid proof of payment.

About.title: PakarGaming: game top-up platform
About.intro1: pakargaming.id is a digital platform focused on game top-ups, vouchers, and entertainment products with a process that is fast, secure, and convenient.
About.intro2: Operated by Aura Pakar Inovasi, we build digital solutions for the modern gaming community.
About.whyP1: We make transactions simple for gamers. With 10+ payment partners across Asia, you get flexible payment options.
About.whyP2: We are committed to stable service, trust, and a comfortable checkout experience.
About.catalogDesc: Popular games and digital vouchers at competitive prices.
